text: The contractor must report any cyber incident to the Contracting Officer within 72 hours of discovery.
verbatimQuote: the Contractor shall rapidly report cyber incidents to DoD within 72 hours of discovery of any cyber incident

text: Submit a monthly progress report no later than the fifth business day of each month.
verbatimQuote: a monthly progress report shall be submitted no later than the fifth business day of the following month

text: Maintain commercial general liability insurance of at least $1,000,000 for the duration of the contract.
verbatimQuote: the Contractor shall maintain insurance in an amount not less than $1,000,000 per occurrence

text: Deliver all technical data with unlimited rights unless otherwise negotiated before award.
verbatimQuote: the Government shall have unlimited rights in technical data delivered under this contract
